violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed levers on soda dispenser were sticky and need to be cleaned.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food in microwaves.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed floor and wall behind stoves needs to be cleaned.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed uncovered food in walk in freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food in microwave upfront in service area. -Observed shelves, walls and floor of refrigerator between food prep area and service area needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Observed doors and sides of cold hold units, refrigerators and side of griddle by fryer need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. -Observed single service cups being used as scoops in cold hold unit for blu cheese and dressing. Single service items should be used once and thrown away.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floor by fryer was very greasy. Observed light shields throughout food prep area have dust build up.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Observed broken light shield by dish washer area.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
